cpu: AMD A8-7600 Radeon R7, 10 Compute Cores 4C+6G
notes: To play Final Fantasy V, install corefonts using winetricks with WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/382890/pfx and the game is playable with no issues found.
title: FINAL FANTASY V

notes: As has been previous stated, corefonts is required, but I have found gdiplus is also needed. To fix the text, run: WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/382890/pfx winetricks gdiplus
title: FINAL FANTASY V

notes: Require to install gdiplus using protontricks (protontricks 382890 gdiplus) or with winetricks (WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/382890/pfx winetricks gdiplus) as mentioned in previous posts. Corefonts doesn't seems to be required.
title: FINAL FANTASY V

notes: Only "WINEPREFIX=YOUR PATH HERE/SteamLibrary/steamapps/compatdata/382890/pfx/ winetricks gdiplus" was needed to fix the text rendering. I just walked around a few minutes but it worked without problems.
title: FINAL FANTASY V

notes: Fonts fixed with gdiplus, runs and can walk around however you cannot get past the name your character dialog as it's just black. Tried with corefonts installed also.
title: FINAL FANTASY V

notes:
I had to follow this instruction : To play Final Fantasy V, install corefonts using winetricks with WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/382890/pfx and the game is playable with no issues found.

And i had a problem with the character naming where i get a black screen, however, removing full screen fixed the problem and allow to play the rest of the game
title: FINAL FANTASY V
